description: Merger-arbitrage spread desk - parses SEC S-4 deal terms on announced M&A, prices gross spread + annualized return + deal-break risk, writes data/merger-arb.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Merger-arb spread desk - twice daily 13:40 and 21:40 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler. Scheduler is the go-forward path; the classic 300-rule EventBridge pool is saturated.
